title: Sky v1
description: One of most downloaded packs on my discord server.
body:
# 🌌 Sky v1 — PvP Resource Pack

**✨ Short Description**  
Take your PvP experience to the stars 🚀. Galaxy Sky v1 replaces the boring vanilla sky with a stunning nebula & starfield, giving your duels a cosmic vibe while keeping FPS smooth ⚡.

---

## 💎 Features
- 🌠 Custom galaxy/nebula skybox.  
- 🗡️ Clean diamond & netherite gear with blue highlights.  
- 🍎 Recolored golden apples & items.  
- ⚡ Optimized for PvP — clear swords, GUI, and hearts.  
- 🎨 16×16/32×32 lightweight resolution (FPS friendly).  

---

## 📥 Installation
1. ⬇️ Download the `.zip` from Modrinth.  
2. ⚙️ Open Minecraft → Options → Resource Packs → “Open Pack Folder”.  
3. 📂 Drop the zip in and enable it (no need to unzip).  
4. 🔄 Enable the pack.

---

## 🔗 Compatibility
- 🖥️ Minecraft versions: **1.20 - 1.21.3**  
- ✅ Works on most PvP clients ([FoxClient](https://www.foxclient.eu), Lunar, Badlion, Feather, etc.).

---
